visual_description: A man with dark hair and a mustache wearing a striped sweater sits at a table opposite a woman with curly blonde hair in a dark sweater and white collar, holding a napkin. The camera briefly focuses on the woman looking down before returning to the man as he looks toward her.
audio_description: Ambient restaurant chatter fills the background while the man speaks quietly.
